privileged_info_summary: The manage_lifecycle_states@1 task involves managing Nuxeo document lifecycle states in a Projects workspace. The task dataset is synthetic but consists of properly formatted documents. Four documents are involved: Annual-Report-2023 and Project-Proposal (both File type PDFs) and Q3-Status-Report (Note type) in the Projects workspace, plus Contract-Template in the Templates workspace. The metadata correctly identifies the document paths and final expected lifecycle states: Annual-Report-2023 and Project-Proposal should reach 'approved' state, Q3-Status-Report should reach 'obsolete' state, and Contract-Template should remain unchanged in 'project' state. Nuxeo's default lifecycle system includes three states (project, approved, obsolete) and the Document.FollowLifecycleTransition API operation is used to transition documents between states. The verifier checks all four documents' final states via REST API and validates state transitions occurred in the audit log.
